item.name: Facilities_(Public_View)
item.title: Facilities (Public View)
item.description:
Included Facility Types:

Toilets – Public restrooms available at mooring points or service blocks

Showers – Shower facilities for boaters and visitors

Laundry – Washing and drying stations at selected service areas

Shore Power – Electrical hook-up points for vessels

Water Points – Fresh water refill stations

Pump-Outs – Waste disposal stations for onboard sanitation systems
item.snippet: The Facilities layer provides spatial data on infrastructure and services available to waterway users. It is designed to assist both recreational and operational users by offering a clear overview of facility locations and types. The data is maintained by Waterways Ireland and supports public engagement, asset management, and service planning.

layerMetadata.name: Facilities
layerMetadata.description: Included Facility Types:Toilets – Public restrooms available at mooring points or service blocksShowers – Shower facilities for boaters and visitorsLaundry – Washing and drying stations at selected service areasCanoe Launching Points (Canoe Steps) – Designated access points for launching or retrieving canoesShore Power – Electrical hook-up points for vesselsWater Points – Fresh water refill stationsPump-Outs – Waste disposal stations for onboard sanitation systems

attributes.Name: Portrunny Harbour - Pump-out
attributes.Additional_Details: Mooring for duration of pump out only.

attributes.Name: Lough Key Forest Park - Pump-out
attributes.Car_Parking_Details: Exit fee applies during peak times. Privately owned by Lough Key Forest Park +353 (0)71 96 73122.
attributes.Additional_Details: Mooring is not permitted. Usage is for the duration of the service only.

attributes.Name: Drumshanbo - Pump-out
attributes.Car_Parking_Details: 3 or 4 vehicles max (steep access & restricted to lock opening  hours only

attributes.Name: Belturbet - Pump-out

attributes.Name: Boyle Harbour - Pump-out
attributes.Additional_Details: Accessibility: level access from carpark. Payment amount is 2 smart card units; Mooring is not permitted. Usage is for the duration of the service only.

attributes.Name: Carrick-on-Shannon - Pump-out (Old)
attributes.Car_Parking_Details: Large Council Carpark (Leitrim Co Co) but heavily used during summer months.
